desc: The first book of Dawn of the Clans, telling how the mountain cats followed a vision to a new forest home.
descZh: 《族群黎明》系列第一部，讲述山地猫群如何追随一个预言，迁往森林新家园的故事。

q.en: Before the journey east, where did the cats live?
q.zh: 在向东迁徙之前，这些猫生活在哪里？

options.en: In a Twoleg village according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 在两脚兽村庄（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The ancient cats lived in a rocky, cold mountain home where prey was scarce before they followed the sun trail to the forest.
explain.zh: 远古的猫群原本生活在岩石嶙峋、寒冷缺食的山地家园，后来才循着太阳的踪迹迁往森林。

q.en: Which elder received the vision of a warm forest full of prey?
q.zh: 哪只老猫接收到了关于温暖而猎物丰盛的森林的预言？

explain.en: Shaded Moss, an elder, was shown the forest in a dream sent by the spirits, and he led the cats to journey there.
explain.zh: 老猫荫苔（Shaded Moss）在祖灵托梦中被展示了那片森林，并带领猫群踏上迁徙之路。

q.en: How did Shaded Moss die on the journey?
q.zh: 荫苔（Shaded Moss）在旅途中是怎么死的？

options.en: He was killed by One Eye according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 被独眼（One Eye）杀死（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He was killed by a monster on the Thunderpath

explain.en: While leading the group across a Thunderpath (a road), Shaded Moss was struck and killed by a monster (a car).
explain.zh: 在带领队伍穿越雷道（马路）时，荫苔被一只怪兽（汽车）撞死。

q.en: Which cat was already living by the river when the traveling cats arrived?
q.zh: 当迁徙的猫群到达时，哪只猫已经住在河边？

options.en: Tall Shadow according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 高影（Tall Shadow）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: River Ripple already lived there with his own group of cats and allowed the travelers to pass.
explain.zh: 河波（River Ripple）早已带着自己的猫群住在那里，并允许迁徙者通过。

q.en: What is the relationship between Gray Wing and Clear Sky?
q.zh: 灰翅（Gray Wing）和晴天（Clear Sky）是什么关系？

explain.en: Gray Wing and Clear Sky are brothers who travel together from the mountains.
explain.zh: 灰翅和晴天是兄弟，一起从山地迁徙而来。

explain.en: Thunder is the son of Clear Sky and a she-cat named Storm.
explain.zh: 雷电是晴天（Clear Sky）与一只名叫风暴（Storm）的母猫的儿子。

q.en: What happens to Storm after she gives birth to Thunder?
q.zh: 风暴（Storm）生下雷电后发生了什么？

explain.en: Storm dies while giving birth, and only her kit Thunder survives. Gray Wing raises him.
explain.zh: 风暴在生育时死去，只有幼崽雷电存活，由灰翅将他抚养长大。

q.en: Which she-cat leaves the traveling group to live with Twolegs as a kittypet?
q.zh: 哪只母猫离开了迁徙队伍，去和两脚兽一起当宠物猫？

options.en: Tall Shadow according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 高影（Tall Shadow）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Turtle Tail becomes disappointed with the hard journey and goes to live with Twolegs, though she later returns.
explain.zh: 龟尾（Turtle Tail）对艰苦的旅程感到失望，去和两脚兽生活，不过后来她又回来了。

q.en: What happens to Jagged Peak on the journey from the mountains?
q.zh: 锯齿峰（Jagged Peak）在离开山地的旅途中发生了什么？

options.en: He breaks his leg and cannot climb
He is killed by a monster
He finds the forest first according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他最先找到森林（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Jagged Peak, the younger brother of Gray Wing and Clear Sky, falls and breaks his leg, so he can no longer climb.
explain.zh: 锯齿峰是灰翅和晴天的弟弟，他在途中摔断了腿，从此无法再攀爬。

q.en: At the end of the book, how do the cats divide the new land?
q.zh: 在本集结尾，猫群是如何划分新领地的？

options.en: They split into groups: forest, moor, river, and hills
options.zh: 它们分成森林、荒原、河流和高地等群体

options.en: They return to the mountains according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它们返回山地（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Clear Sky takes the forest, Tall Shadow the moor, Wind Runner the open moor, and River Ripple the river — beginning the separation that leads to the Clans.
explain.zh: 晴天占据森林，高影占据荒原高地，风奔占据开阔荒原，河波占据河流——这正是后来族群分立的开端。
